context: Evaluates the correct use of the vault_status Tauri command to inspect vault state. Tests that the solution correctly reads both the `exists` and `locked` fields and exposes them via well-structured helper functions.

checklist.name: vault_status invocation
checklist.description: The solution calls `vault_status` (no arguments) and reads the returned `VaultStatus` object.

checklist.name: exists field usage
checklist.description: The solution reads and correctly returns the `exists` boolean field from the vault status result.

checklist.name: locked field usage
checklist.description: The solution reads and correctly returns the `locked` boolean field from the vault status result.

checklist.name: Async correctness
checklist.description: All calls to `vault_status` are properly awaited and the async return type is correctly declared.
